text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet village nestled amongst the mountains, a wise old owl named Oona lived alone. Oona loved to listen to the tales birds sang. She often listened to their poetry. One night, she heard a beautiful song about love. Intrivated, Oona flew outside and discovered a gentle dove singing beneath an oak.

"Tell your love story," Oona whispered.

The dove fluttered closer. "A long time ago..."

As dawn broke, a young hare named Will discovered Oona. fascinated.

"...I wooed her with my song. Oona loved me. We lived happily ever after."

Oona smiled warmly. "That's sweet."

Sometimes, Oona wouldn*w Owl-WA?!

"A true friend?" A tiny chipmunk chanted.

Oona winked.

"Aww... you two?"

Oona fluttered away giggling.

The chipmunk giggled too. Perhaps love wasn*O?

Yes! A small beetle buzzed.
